languages.text: "Искусство, с которым эта машина соединяет плоть и священное железо, столь трудоемко и филигранно, что ни один человек не сможет повторить его. Многие медикарии здесь добились больших успехов в своей практике, лишь грубо подражая целительным таинствам, производимым троном над своими пациентами. Его потеря лишит Сектор Бионика души, Лорд-капитан. Мы не можем этого допустить".

"The artistry with which this machine joins flesh and sacred metal is so laborious and delicate that no human can replicate its efforts. Many medicae officers here have accomplished great things in their practice, but these successes are only crude imitations of the healing sacraments performed by the throne on their patients. Its loss would rob the Sector Bionica of its soul, Lord Captain. We cannot allow that to happen."
languages.original_text: "Искусство, с которым эта машина соединяет плоть и священное железо, столь трудоемко и филигранно, что ни один человек не сможет повторить его. Многие медикарии здесь добились больших успехов в своей практике, лишь грубо подражая целительным таинствам, производимым троном над своими пациентами. Его потеря лишит Сектор Бионика души, Лорд-капитан. Мы не можем этого допустить".

Its loss would rob the Sector Bionica of its soul, Lord Captain. We cannot allow that to happen."

Many medicae officers here have accomplished great things in their practice, but these successes are only crude imitations of the healing sacraments performed by the throne on their patients. Its loss would rob the Sector Bionica of its soul, Lord Captain. We cannot allow that to happen."

languages.text: “这台机器用于连接血肉与神圣金属的精湛技艺，繁复精密到人类根本无法复制。这里的许多医务官都在实践中成就了伟业，但相较于王座在病人身上所施行的治疗圣礼，这些成就都只是些粗劣的模仿。若失去它，仿生区便会失去灵魂，舰长大人。我们绝不能让这种事发生。”
languages.original_text: "The artistry with which this machine joins flesh and sacred metal is so laborious and delicate that no human can replicate its efforts. Many medicae officers here have accomplished great things in their practice, but these successes are only crude imitations of the healing sacraments performed by the throne on their patients. Its loss would rob the Sector Bionica of its soul, Lord Captain. We cannot allow that to happen."

traits.locale_text: “这台机器用于连接血肉与神圣金属的精湛技艺，繁复精密到人类根本无法复制。这里的许多医务官都在实践中成就了伟业，但相较于王座在病人身上所施行的治疗圣礼，这些成就都只是些粗劣的模仿。若失去它，仿生区便会失去灵魂，舰长大人。我们绝不能让这种事发生。”

languages.text: «El arte con que esta máquina combina la carne con el sagrado metal es tan laborioso y delicado que ningún humano sería capaz de dominarlo. Muchos oficiales de medicae han obrado grandes proezas en el ejercicio de su práctica, pero sus logros palidecen en comparación con los sacramentos curativos que el trono dispensa a sus pacientes. Perderlo sería como despojar al Sector Bionica de su alma, Lord Capitán. No podemos permitirlo».
languages.original_text: "The artistry with which this machine joins flesh and sacred metal is so laborious and delicate that no human can replicate its efforts. Many medicae officers here have accomplished great things in their practice, but these successes are only crude imitations of the healing sacraments performed by the throne on their patients. Its loss would rob the Sector Bionica of its soul, Lord Captain. We cannot allow that to happen."

traits.locale_text: «El arte con que esta máquina combina la carne con el sagrado metal es tan laborioso y delicado que ningún humano sería capaz de dominarlo. Muchos oficiales de medicae han obrado grandes proezas en el ejercicio de su práctica, pero sus logros palidecen en comparación con los sacramentos curativos que el trono dispensa a sus pacientes. Perderlo sería como despojar al Sector Bionica de su alma, Lord Capitán. No podemos permitirlo».

languages.text: « Cette machine est capable de combiner la chair et le métal sacré d'une manière si complexe et délicate qu'aucun humain ne peut reproduire ses actions. Les nombreux succès remportés par les officiers de medicae d'ici ne sont que des imitations grossières des sacrements guérisseurs que le fauteuil effectue sur les patients. Sa disparition ferait perdre son âme au secteur Bionica, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous ne pouvons pas laisser une telle chose se produire. »
languages.original_text: "The artistry with which this machine joins flesh and sacred metal is so laborious and delicate that no human can replicate its efforts. Many medicae officers here have accomplished great things in their practice, but these successes are only crude imitations of the healing sacraments performed by the throne on their patients. Its loss would rob the Sector Bionica of its soul, Lord Captain. We cannot allow that to happen."

traits.locale_text: « Cette machine est capable de combiner la chair et le métal sacré d'une manière si complexe et délicate qu'aucun humain ne peut reproduire ses actions. Les nombreux succès remportés par les officiers de medicae d'ici ne sont que des imitations grossières des sacrements guérisseurs que le fauteuil effectue sur les patients. Sa disparition ferait perdre son âme au secteur Bionica, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous ne pouvons pas laisser une telle chose se produire. »

languages.text: "Die Kunstfertigkeit, mit der diese Maschine Fleisch und heiliges Metall vereint, ist so aufwendig und grazil, dass kein Mensch ihre Bemühungen zu replizieren vermag. Viele Medicae-Offiziere hier haben große Dinge erreicht, aber diese Erfolge sind nur primitive Imitationen der Sakramente der Heilung, die der Thron seinen Patienten gewährt. Ihr Verlust würde den Sektor Bionica seiner Seele berauben, Lord Captain. Das dürfen wir nicht zulassen."
languages.original_text: "The artistry with which this machine joins flesh and sacred metal is so laborious and delicate that no human can replicate its efforts. Many medicae officers here have accomplished great things in their practice, but these successes are only crude imitations of the healing sacraments performed by the throne on their patients. Its loss would rob the Sector Bionica of its soul, Lord Captain. We cannot allow that to happen."

traits.locale_text: "Die Kunstfertigkeit, mit der diese Maschine Fleisch und heiliges Metall vereint, ist so aufwendig und grazil, dass kein Mensch ihre Bemühungen zu replizieren vermag. Viele Medicae-Offiziere hier haben große Dinge erreicht, aber diese Erfolge sind nur primitive Imitationen der Sakramente der Heilung, die der Thron seinen Patienten gewährt. Ihr Verlust würde den Sektor Bionica seiner Seele berauben, Lord Captain. Das dürfen wir nicht zulassen."

languages.text: "Bu makinenin et ile kutsal metali birleştirme sanatı o kadar zahmetli ve hassastır ki hiçbir insan onun çabalarını tekrarlayamaz. Buradaki pek çok sıhhiye subayı, uygulamalarında harika işler başarmıştır. Ancak bu başarılar, sadece tahtın hastaları üzerinde gerçekleştirdiği iyileştirme ayinlerinin kaba taklitleridir. Onun kaybı, Sektör Biyonika'yı ruhundan mahrum eder Lord Kaptan. Bunun olmasına izin veremeyiz."
languages.original_text: "The artistry with which this machine joins flesh and sacred metal is so laborious and delicate that no human can replicate its efforts. Many medicae officers here have accomplished great things in their practice, but these successes are only crude imitations of the healing sacraments performed by the throne on their patients. Its loss would rob the Sector Bionica of its soul, Lord Captain. We cannot allow that to happen."

traits.locale_text: "Bu makinenin et ile kutsal metali birleştirme sanatı o kadar zahmetli ve hassastır ki hiçbir insan onun çabalarını tekrarlayamaz. Buradaki pek çok sıhhiye subayı, uygulamalarında harika işler başarmıştır. Ancak bu başarılar, sadece tahtın hastaları üzerinde gerçekleştirdiği iyileştirme ayinlerinin kaba taklitleridir. Onun kaybı, Sektör Biyonika'yı ruhundan mahrum eder Lord Kaptan. Bunun olmasına izin veremeyiz."

languages.text: 「この機械が肉体と聖なる金属を接合する技術は、非常に手間と繊細さを要するものであり、人間には真似できないものです。このセクター・ビオニカの多くの医療官は、治療で素晴らしい成果を上げていますが、それは、この座が患者に施す癒しの聖典の粗い模倣に過ぎません。この座を失うことは、セクター・ビオニカに魂を奪われることになります。それを許すわけにはいきません」
languages.original_text: "The artistry with which this machine joins flesh and sacred metal is so laborious and delicate that no human can replicate its efforts. Many medicae officers here have accomplished great things in their practice, but these successes are only crude imitations of the healing sacraments performed by the throne on their patients. Its loss would rob the Sector Bionica of its soul, Lord Captain. We cannot allow that to happen."
